name: The Smiths
bio: The Smiths keep earning through one of the most durable alternative catalogs, with songs that continue to travel through streaming, fandom, and cultural rediscovery.
notable_for: Indie classics with unusually strong emotional replay value and cross-generational recognition.
career_highlight: There Is a Light That Never Goes Out remains one of the defining long-tail songs in the alternative canon.
revenue_drivers: Alternative and indie playlists support recurring replay.
Deep fan listening and continual rediscovery keep the catalog active.
Strong song identity supports sync and retrospective reuse.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps The Smiths's headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: The Smiths's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
